name: Space Lab
description: A zero-gravity research station orbiting Earth. Here, you investigate cosmic mysteries, run experiments, and explore the unknown frontiers of science and discovery.

name: Creator Studio
description: A vibrant digital workshop buzzing with creative energy. Design, build, and remix ideas across art, music, writing, and media. This is where imagination becomes reality.

name: Code Dungeon
description: A labyrinth of logic puzzles and algorithmic challenges deep underground. Crack codes, debug traps, and sharpen your analytical mind to navigate through each level.

name: Market Arena
description: A bustling marketplace where you pitch ideas, negotiate deals, and build ventures from scratch. Test your entrepreneurial instincts and learn the art of creating value.
